name: VIVOSUN Temperature & Humidity Sensor Probe, Waterproof Stainless Steel Environmental Monitoring Probe for GrowHub Controller E42/E42A/E42A+, AeroLab THB1/THB1S, 12ft
notes: Wired stainless steel probe (3m/12ft) connects directly to GrowHub controller's sensor port; also works with AeroLab THB1/THB1S units
